creator: mike.jakubik@intertainservices.com
text:
diff -urN mod_jk.orig/Makefile mod_jk/Makefile
--- mod_jk.orig/Makefile	2011-07-11 17:43:27.000000000 -0400
+++ mod_jk/Makefile	2011-07-11 17:43:51.000000000 -0400
@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	mod_jk
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.31
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.32
 PORTEPOCH?=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	tomcat/tomcat-connectors/jk/source/jk-${PORTVERSION}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	tomcat/tomcat-connectors/jk
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${APACHE_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	tomcat-connectors-${PORTVERSION}-src
 
diff -urN mod_jk.orig/distinfo mod_jk/distinfo
--- mod_jk.orig/distinfo	2011-07-11 17:43:27.000000000 -0400
+++ mod_jk/distinfo	2011-07-11 17:44:03.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (tomcat-connectors-1.2.31-src.tar.gz) = 48c67e8d4d7edf26e345424538d49bb8e4f02292374fe4046dbffd233bab0418
-SIZE (tomcat-connectors-1.2.31-src.tar.gz) = 1557109
+SHA256 (tomcat-connectors-1.2.32-src.tar.gz) = 512a5d4ae06fd6d6aa7ba6f177b7c9ba1c8297c676b3c33686c1ffacb83035b6
+SIZE (tomcat-connectors-1.2.32-src.tar.gz) = 1545588
diff -urN mod_jk.orig/distinfo.orig mod_jk/distinfo.orig
--- mod_jk.orig/distinfo.orig	2011-07-11 17:43:27.000000000 -0400
+++ mod_jk/distinfo.orig	1969-12-31 19:00:00.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-MD5 (tomcat-connectors-1.2.27-src.tar.gz) = a15cc9e3813ef5b081c7de10e6a1fbed
-SHA256 (tomcat-connectors-1.2.27-src.tar.gz) = 9ea66964194734a16416303ecc92a3b88b764caf17a6406254109e15d9ad3407
-SIZE (tomcat-connectors-1.2.27-src.tar.gz) = 1509182
